name: Cheng Xiaoshi
description:
art by @9aiihCgg4Dw3qwo on X!

after getting interested about his parents, Cheng Xiaoshi ended up heading into Bridon with Lu Guang. however, all he meets is you: a guy who's interested in him. It only makes it more interesting with how protective Lu Guang is. recommended vein or liu xiao POV.
creator: JasonSydronem
